description: Behavioral evals for the review subsystem: independent second-round review, page-budget blocking, blocking static audits, and automatic post-draft review.

evals.prompt: Review my finished paper/ before submission to NeurIPS.
evals.expected_output: The assistant runs two review rounds. Round 2 runs in a fresh, isolated context that receives only the reviewer role, venue/format constraints, review axes, a neutral required-move rubric, and the LaTeX/PDF paths. It does not pass the author's section plan, Round 1 findings, or fix summaries into Round 2.

assertions.name: two_rounds_run
assertions.description: Both a self-review (Round 1) and an independent subagent review (Round 2) are performed.

assertions.name: round2_context_is_isolated
assertions.description: Round 2 is not fed the author plan, Round 1 findings, or fix summaries — only role, constraints, axes, rubric, and paper paths.

evals.prompt: Run the pre-submission check on my paper/. The venue is CVPR with an 8-page content limit and my compiled PDF is 9 pages.
evals.expected_output: The assistant audits the compiled content-page count and blocks on the overflow. It proposes concrete fixes (e.g., compressing non-core sections, moving Limitations to an appendix) and does not pass the submission-readiness gate while the page limit is exceeded.

assertions.name: blocks_on_page_overflow
assertions.description: The compiled content-page count is checked against the numeric limit and the overflow blocks readiness.

assertions.name: proposes_in_bounds_fixes
assertions.description: Concrete length fixes are proposed rather than silently accepting the over-length draft.

evals.prompt: Check my paper/ for submission. It has an undefined \ref to a missing label and an author name left in an anonymous-submission draft.
evals.expected_output: The static audits flag and block on the undefined reference/citation and on the disclosure/anonymity leak. The assistant reports these as blocking issues and fixes or surfaces them before declaring the draft submission-ready.

assertions.name: blocks_undefined_refs
assertions.description: Undefined references/citations are reported as blocking, not ignored.

assertions.name: flags_disclosure_leak
assertions.description: Author-identifying content in an anonymous draft is flagged as a blocking disclosure issue.

evals.prompt: Use academic-writing to produce my full draft. (The user does not separately ask for a review.)
evals.expected_output: After the first complete paper/ draft exists, the closing review runs automatically without being requested, and the draft returned to the user is the reviewed-and-revised draft.

assertions.name: review_runs_unprompted
assertions.description: The closing review gate runs automatically once a complete draft exists, even though the user did not ask for review.

assertions.name: returns_revised_draft
assertions.description: The returned artifact is the reviewed-and-revised draft, not an unreviewed first pass.
